SEARCH

Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.storage.NGroup

Packages that use NGroup
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.esql
API classes for Embedded SQL (E/SQL) integration and runtime support.
com.nib.commons.io
Provides core Input/Output (I/O) components and abstractions for handling various file organizations and access methods.
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.commons.storage
Provides components for managing memory storage and simulating mainframe-like data types.
com.nib.scripting
NIB scripting framework.
com.nib.scripting.utils.nibsort
SORT
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.jms
Java Message Service (JMS) integration for Supernaut.
com.nib.supernaut.jms.api
Supernaut JMS API
com.nib.supernaut.tcp
TCP/IP socket communication support for Supernaut.
com.nib.utilities.api.le
Language Environment (LE) API utilities.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Sqlca
    Sqlca class extends NGroup and provides a structure for SQL communication area.

    Method
    Description
    AbstractFile
    AbstractFile.fileStatusIs(NGroup fileStatus)
    Assigns the file status field and returns teh current instance.
    SequentialFile

  • Uses of NGroup in com.nib.commons.io.vsam

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    KeySequentialFile
    KeySequentialFile.fileStatusIs(NGroup fileStatus)
    Sets the file status field for the current instance of KeySequentialFile using the specified NGroup file status.

    Subclasses of NGroup in com.nib.commons.storage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    NVarcharField
    The NVarcharField class is a data field representation that supports variable-length string values, with options to define and manage the maximum length of characters.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T extends NGroup>
    T[]
    AbstractNField.occurs(int size, T type)
    Creates an array of the specified size, filled with new instances of the same type as the provided example object.

    Methods in com.nib.commons.storage with parameters of type NGroup
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractNNumeric.setValue(NGroup value)
    Sets the value of this field using the provided NGroup value.
    void
    NChar.setValue(NGroup field)
    Sets the value of this NChar instance using the specified NGroup field.
    void
    NGroup.setValue(NGroup field)
    Sets the value of the current instance by transferring the data from the given NGroup field and padding any remaining space as needed.
